overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a sci-fi game showing a character in futuristic armor with a cape running across a vast industrial platform during a hazy golden hour. The character passes beneath a massive floating structure and stops at the platform edge to overlook a distant vista with tall spires.

scene_state.functional_zone: open industrial landing platform with distant towers

agents.ego_description: sprinting steadily across the open platform toward a large floating structure on the right

entered.detail: massive rectangular floating building with glass windows and metal panels overhanging the platform
series of thin vertical metal towers rising from the platform in the hazy distance
smooth metallic deck with painted yellow and red markings
faint blue glowing light source visible through the haze

segments.scene_description: The character runs across a vast open industrial platform during golden hour, approaching a massive floating structure on the right. Tall spires pierce the hazy sky in the distance, and the metallic surface shows painted markings.

events.description: character enters the shadow beneath the massive floating industrial structure

agents.ego_description: continuing to sprint under the dark overhang of the floating building

entered.detail: vertical metal pillars supporting the underside of the floating structure

segments.scene_description: Running beneath the floating structure's shadow, the lighting shifts to a darker, sheltered environment. The underside of the building features linear lights and support columns while the character continues moving forward.

events.description: exits the shadow back into the open golden hour sunlight
character slows from running to a complete stop at the platform edge

agents.ego_description: slowing to a walk and stopping to look out over the distant hazy vista

entered.detail: long low industrial wall visible at the horizon line
large curved architectural support structure on the right side of the platform

segments.scene_description: Emerging back into open sunlight, the character stops at the platform edge overlooking a vast industrial vista. The floating structure recedes behind as a distant perimeter wall and curved architectural supports come into view.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement across a vast industrial platform that transitions from open golden sunlight into a deep shadow before emerging to a wide panoramic vista. It begins with the character running across a metallic surface marked with paint, moving toward a massive floating structure as tall spires pierce the hazy horizon. As the character passes beneath the structure, the lighting shifts abruptly to a darker, sheltered environment defined by linear lights and heavy support columns. The scene then opens back into the brilliant sunlight as the character reaches the platform's edge, leaving the floating building behind. Finally, the camera settles on a distant industrial landscape featuring a perimeter wall and curved architectural supports under the glowing sky.
